rag_rules: Guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Fix type mismatches by ensuring left and right sides of '=' expressions are of the same type
generic_rules: Only use visible AADL features or helper declarations in AGREE contracts
Move invalid implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by fixing root unresolved references
Ensure type consistency in AGREE helper declarations and expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree blocks
Component type contracts reference only visible ports and features
Implementation annexes are for bindings and assignments valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Placing guarantee statements in component implementation annexes instead of component type annexes
Using unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
